footLocal.message: Everything stays local on your machine.

pairIntro.message: Open RootPass, go to Settings → Browser extension, click "Connect the extension", then enter the code below.

errExpired.message: Code expired. Generate a new one.

lockedBody.message: RootPass vault is locked. Unlock the app to continue.

appNotFound.message: RootPass app not found. Launch RootPass then reopen this popup.

openSite.message: Open a website to see your accounts.

contentLocked.message: RootPass vault is locked. Unlock the app.

contentNotConnected.message: RootPass not connected. Open the app and pair the extension.
